title: Allods Online My.com
notes: The Steam API dll needs to be deleted from the game folder, otherwise the game complains about Steam "not running"

Unfortunately, while removing the steam_api.dll file will resolve the "steam needs to be running in order to play" issue, it also means you can't login with steam. So, unless you have a separate account tied to an email address, you will be unable to play.
